title: T-030 — E2E spine: WR → approve → start → consume spare → complete + cross-module outbox + Playwright trace
prompt:
# T-030 — End-to-end MWO spine + cross-module integration test

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §6.2 data flow, §8.2 mwo_state_machine_v1, §12.3 outbox
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Playwright E2E test asserting full MWO lifecycle works end-to-end: Submit Work Request → Manager Approve → Assign → Start (LOTO gate) → Consume spare part → Complete sign-off → outbox events to 12-reporting + 15-OEE + 09-quality consumer queues. Closes Auditor A CIG-3 (Production WO ⇄ Quality hold gate) on the maintenance side.

## Pre-flight
Verify T-018..T-027 UI tasks complete (or at least T-018, T-021, T-022, T-023, T-025 dashboard + WR + MWO Detail + Spares + LOTO landed). Verify Wave1 T-123 Playwright primitive (browser, fixtures). Verify Testcontainers Postgres infra. Verify T-012 outbox dispatcher writes consumer queue rows (queues can be in-memory mock if cross-module modules not yet bootstrapped).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/e2e/maintenance-spine.spec.ts` Playwright test with these steps as a single trace:
   - Seed: org, manager+technician users, equipment.requires_loto=true, calibration_instrument, spare_parts_stock qty=10.
   - Login as technician → /maintenance/wr → "Submit Work Request" modal → fill (asset, severity, problem desc) → submit → assert WR appears in list state='requested'.
   - Logout / login as manager → /maintenance/wr → Triage → Approve with priority+type+technician → assert MWO row state='approved'.
   - Manager assigns technician → /maintenance/mwos → row action "Assign & Open" → state='open'.
   - Login as assigned technician → /maintenance/mwos/[id] → click Start Work → assert LOTO blocker banner shown → open LOTO Apply modal → fill → submit → re-enter Start Work → state='in_progress'.
   - Tasks tab → check off all steps; Parts tab → Consume spare (qty=2) → assert spare_parts_stock.qty_on_hand=8.
   - Complete signoff modal → assert allOk=true → Confirm → state='completed'.
   - Assert outbox table contains rows for: mwo.requested, mwo.approved, mwo.in_progress, mwo.completed, spare_parts.consumed, loto.applied, loto.cleared (released via T-014 separately).
   - Assert consumer queue mock received 3 messages for mwo.completed (12-reporting, 15-OEE, 09-quality) per T-012 routing.
2. Capture Playwright trace.zip + screenshots + video to `e2e-artifacts/maintenance-spine/` for closeout evidence per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.
3. Vitest companion (Testcontainers DB) verifies outbox dispatcher routing if e2e cannot mock consumer queues.

## Files
- apps/web/e2e/maintenance-spine.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/_fixtures/maintenance-seed.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/_fixtures/maintenance-mock-consumer-queue.ts [create]
- apps/web/__tests__/maintenance-spine-routing.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Playwright test runs end-to-end, when assertion list executes, then every step transition (requested→approved→open→in_progress→completed) and every modal interaction (WR Create, Triage, LOTO Apply, Complete signoff) completes successfully.
2. Given the spare consume step, when DB inspected post-step, then spare_parts_stock.qty_on_hand=8 (10-2) and spare_parts_transactions row with txn_type='consume' and mwo_id NOT NULL is present.
3. Given the outbox is queried at test end, when filtered to this MWO, then rows for `mwo.requested`, `mwo.approved`, `mwo.in_progress`, `mwo.completed`, `spare_parts.consumed`, `loto.applied`, `loto.cleared` are all present with `published_at NOT NULL`.
4. Given the mock consumer queue is inspected, when checked, then mwo.completed produced 3 queue messages (12-reporting, 15-OEE, 09-quality) per T-012 routing.
5. Given closeout, when reviewers inspect e2e-artifacts/maintenance-spine/, then trace.zip + screenshots + video are present per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Test strategy
- RED: write the spec; expect failures until all dependencies ship (UI tasks T-018..T-025 + Server Actions T-010..T-017 + outbox T-012).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web exec playwright test maintenance-spine` and `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run maintenance-spine-routing`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not assert specific timestamps — use relative assertions (`.toBeAfter(startTime)`).
- Do not skip the LOTO gate path — V-MNT-07 is a release-critical safety contract.
- Do not mock Server Actions — call them through actual UI interactions (Playwright).
- Do not require all consumer modules to be live — mock consumer queues are acceptable for routing verification.
- Do not paste UI prototype JSX into the spec — interact via test-ids and visible text.
- Do not omit Playwright artifacts in closeout — UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md mandates them.

out_of_scope: Calibration spine (would be a follow-up T-030.b if budget allows)
